reportOverview.plainEnglishScope: This report explains supplied public lookup context and sibling sample-output structure in plain English. It does not diagnose, estimate disease risk, report carrier status, classify pathogenicity, or say all screened conditions are clear.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A selected public variant identifier is available for lookup and annotation context. No personal disease-screening, disease-risk, carrier-status, pathogenicity, or clinical interpretation output is supplied.
resultRows.sourceLabel: NCBI dbSNP; Ensembl REST; Ensembl VEP
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The row can be used to explain that a public rs identifier exists and can be looked up in external resources. It does not say whether there is a disease-screen finding.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: GRCh38 reference-build context is available for the selected lookup, while alternate-build conversion, remapping outputs, and disease-screen service output are not supplied.
resultRows.sourceLabel: NCBI Variation Services / SPDI; Ensembl REST
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The report can name the supplied build context, but disease screening or clinical interpretation requires exact supplied outputs and cannot be inferred from the fixture.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The cover and table of contents identify a Healthcare Pro sample report with sections for STAT Alerts, Increased Risk Detected, Medications (Pharmacogenomics), Rare Diseases, No Increased Risk Detected, and Analysis Alerts. This row captures sample-report structure only and does not prove a local Healthcare Pro report was generated.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed sibling Healthcare Pro sample-report structure only. Keep this separate from local Next-Gen Disease Screen evidence; it is not a personal diagnosis, disease-risk estimate, carrier-status call, pathogenicity classification, clinical significance claim, clinical sensitivity claim, all-clear reassurance, screening guidance, testing guidance, medication guidance, treatment guidance, or actionability conclusion.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample report labels CAD & MI as Increased Risk Detected and shows a 55% lifetime-risk sample estimate compared with a 42% male population-risk label. This is sample output only; local output must not reuse the percentages as a personal coronary disease or heart-attack risk estimate.

uncertainty: No calibrated disease probability, screening sensitivity, pathogenicity, carrier-status, or clinical-actionability model is supplied for this local package.
Healthcare Pro rows are sibling sample-output structure only and cannot be treated as local Next-Gen Disease Screen findings.
The selected rows support boundary context only and cannot be treated as disease-screen output.
limitations: This validation result uses selected derived evidence only; raw genome data, VCF, FASTQ, BAM, CRAM, and complete callset files are not included.
The package does not emit complete SNP tables, sequencing files, alignment files, or clinical screening output files.

The package does not diagnose disease, estimate disease risk, classify pathogenicity, report carrier status, reassure that no health findings exist, infer medication response, or recommend screening, testing, treatment, diet, supplements, or lifestyle changes.
